overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy sprinting through lush overgrown ruins. The character runs along rocky paths surrounded by vibrant red vegetation and tropical foliage, transitioning from enclosed rocky overhangs to open areas with visible enemies in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown hillside path with red vegetation

agents.ego_description: sprinting along rocky path through lush overgrown hillside with red foliage

entered.detail: vibrant red bushes covering the hillside slope
uneven stone path winding through vegetation
large rocky cliff formation covered in greenery
tall tropical trees rising above the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character runs along an open hillside trail surrounded by dense tropical vegetation and striking red foliage. The path winds through rocky terrain under bright midday sun, with tall palm trees visible in the distance and misty valleys to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient ruin passage with rock overhangs

events.description: entering shaded area beneath large rock overhang
passing through stone archway into dappled light

agents.ego_description: running through narrow passage under rock formations and ancient ruins

entered.detail: large rock formation creating natural roof over the path
ancient stone arch marking passage through ruins
weathered stone wall covered in moss and vines

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered passage beneath massive rock overhangs, transitioning from bright sunlight to diffused shade. The path leads through an ancient stone archway surrounded by moss-covered ruins, with red vegetation now visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown ruin corridor with derelict vehicles

events.description: passing moss-covered derelict vehicles on the left
exiting narrow ruin passage into more open area

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense ruins past abandoned vehicles overgrown with vegetation

entered.detail: abandoned vehicle completely covered in green moss
collapsed ancient building walls and foundations
large green ferns growing along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The character runs past moss-covered derelict cars and through narrow passages between ancient stone ruins. The environment is densely vegetated with tropical ferns and palms, transitioning from the shaded overhang to a slightly more open area with scattered ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: open combat field with scattered ruins

events.description: enemies become visible in the open field ahead
character slows slightly approaching combat zone

agents.ego_description: approaching enemy creatures in open field, preparing for engagement

notable_agents.action: enemy creatures standing in the open field ahead, appearing hostile

entered.detail: wide open area with sparse vegetation and exposed ground
tall ancient structure visible on the horizon
fallen and standing dead trees scattered across the field

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the ruins into a wide open field, the character approaches a combat zone where enemy creatures are visible in the distance. The landscape features scattered dead trees, patches of red vegetation, and a distant stone tower, with the character slowing down as they prepare to engage the hostiles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant tropical wilderness that transitions from open hillsides into shaded ruins before emerging into a wide combat zone. It begins with the character sprinting along an open hillside trail under a bright midday sun, surrounded by dense red foliage and misty valleys. As the path winds forward, the scene shifts into a semi-covered passage beneath massive rock overhangs, moving from brilliant light into diffused shade through an ancient stone archway. The camera then follows the character past moss-covered derelict cars and narrow stone ruins densely packed with ferns and palms. Finally, the environment opens up into a wide field of scattered dead trees and red vegetation, where the character slows down upon spotting enemy creatures and a distant stone tower.
